summary: Iteration 51 testing complete. All requested features verified: Header two-row layout on mobile (430px), subscription management visible for Square users, PickCard in Tracking tab working, sport toggle functional. Fixed horizontal overflow issue in header CSS.

issues: Logo text 'ReversePicks' gets truncated to 'REVERS' on 430px viewport due to space constraints - acceptable tradeoff to prevent overflow

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Header two-row layout working - header-top-row contains logo, sport selector, bell, logout
VERIFIED: Header status row contains API badge, v2.3 badge, Refresh button
FIXED: Horizontal overflow on mobile (430px) - added overflow-x: hidden and max-width: 100vw to header, html, body, #root
VERIFIED: Sport toggle works (Soccer/Basketball switch correctly)
VERIFIED: Scan tab renders with upload zone and CHOOSE IMAGE button
VERIFIED: Tracking tab loads without errors (PickCard component working)
VERIFIED: Tab switcher (Live/Won/Lost/Pushed) all activate correctly
VERIFIED: Profile tab shows Subscription section for Square user (xaviersteverson@gmail.com)
VERIFIED: Subscription shows Current Plan (Weekly — $11/week), Status (ACTIVE), Next Billing (4/11/2026), Change Plan button
VERIFIED: Bottom nav works with green pill active state
VERIFIED: No JavaScript console errors on any tab

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI tests passed after CSS fix)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified the three fixes: (1) Header two-row layout on mobile - logo+sport+bell+logout on top row, API+v2.3+refresh on bottom row. Fixed horizontal overflow by adding overflow-x: hidden to header, html, body, #root. (2) Subscription management visible for all users - fetches from Square API, shows plan/status/billing/change-plan for Square subscribers, auto-hides if no subscription. (3) PickCard in TrackingTab working correctly. All navigation and tab switching works. No console errors.
